_comment: Manual reviewer overrides for the POI de-dup, applied on top of the automatic name+OSM passes. Names are matched (case-insensitive, punctuation-tolerant) within the category against poi_curated.json. 'merge' = force [child, parent] into one (child absorbed into parent). 'separate' = force [a, b] to stay distinct (never merged together).

merge: Children's Discovery Museum of San Jose
History Park (operated by History San Jose)
University of California Museum of Paleontology
separate: Veterans Memorial Building of San Ramon Valley
Museum of the San Ramon Valley
Museum of Art and Digital Entertainment - (MADE)
